title: Febreze 3Volution Air Freshener Plug-In Refills, 4 Refills (20ML x 4), Pet Odour Fighter, 3 Alternating Scents to Fight Odours
features: Continuously fights odours and alternates between 3 complementary scents for noticeable freshness
Lasts up to 90 days (if used 12h per day at low setting)
A boosted scent that travels further
It fights tough lingering pet odours and leaves a light fresh scent
Unique Febreze Odourclear technology doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent
description: Product Description Febreze 3Volution Air Freshener Pet with Odourclear technology continuously fights odours and alternates between 3 complementary scents for freshness you keep noticing. Lasts up to 90 days (if used 12h per day on low setting). This blend fights tough lingering pet odours and leaves a light fresh scent. Let a sense of calm envelop you as this clean & gentle scent fills the air. With traditional plugs, we get used to to scents quickly and stop noticing them. Febreze 3Volution renews the freshness by continously & automatically alternating between 3 complementary, high quality scents every 45 minutes. Use Febreze 3Volution refills with the 3Volution Electrical Diffuser to fill your home with freshness and fragrance that you will keep noticing day after day, week after week. 3Volution also lets you adjust the level of scent, helping you to create the ambiance that you want, when you want. Ingredients 4-Tert-Butylcyclohexyl Acetate, Linalool, Tetrahydrolinalool, Linalyl Acetate, Ethyl 2,2-Dimethylhydrocinnamal, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Pentamethylheptenone, Limonene, Cyclamen Aldehyde, Citronellol, Hydroxycitronellal, Hexyl Salicylate, Dimethyl-3-Cyclohexene-1-Carbaldehyde, Geraniol, Methylenedioxyphenyl Methylpropanal, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Eucalyptol, Geranyl Acetate, Dimethyl Heptenal, Methylundecanal, Citral, Coumarin, Lauraldehyde, Dihydro Pentamethylindanone, Beta-Pinene, 2,4-Dimethyl-3-Cyclohexene Carboxaldehyde, Scentenal, Delta-Damascone, Methyl Dihydroxy-Dimethylbenzoate, Methyl 2-Octynoate, 4-(4-Methyl-3-Pentenyl)Cyclohex-3-Ene-1-Carbaldehyde, Isoeugenol, Eugenol, Allyl Cyclohexylpropionate Manufacturer Contact Information Procter &Gamble DCE BV Belgium Distr.
